headline: Eli Lilly Stock And The Price Of Confidence
summary: Management lifted its profit outlook, and investors have more than quadrupled that bet. The question now is what they're really paying for.

headline: Why CELC Stock Declined 15% in a Week Despite a Major FDA Win
summary: Celcuity slides 15% despite FDA approval of Revtorpyk as investors focus on a late Q3 2026 launch that delays commercial sales and near-term revenues.

headline: What to Watch in Pfizer's Non-Oncology Portfolio This Earnings Season
summary: Pfizer's non-oncology portfolio faced mixed Q2 trends. Eliquis and Vyndaqel sales may have risen while COVID products will have declined.
